svg.title: Kubernetes Cluster Architecture — SecureGrade Portal
svg.desc: Four-namespace Kubernetes cluster with portal-prod, data, security, and monitoring namespaces, external actors, protocol-labelled arrows, and a security controls legend.
svg.text: Pod Security: Restricted · CIS Benchmark · Default-deny NetworkPolicy
Non-root · Read-only FS · Trivy Scanned · Pod Security: Restricted
